narrative:
North Olmsted-03-E (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 987 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.4%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.5 percentage points.
